paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: Tsinghua University & Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI)
raw_extraction.innovation: **GLM** introduces **autoregressive blank infilling**, masking continuous spans of tokens and requiring autoregressive reconstruction while preserving inter-dependency relationships through 2D positional encoding. Unlike prior methods, it unifies NLU, conditional, and unconditional generation tasks within a single framework.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpus (mentioned as 'large-scale text corpus')
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, conditional/unconditional text generation, sequence-to-sequence tasks, and downstream NLU tasks like sentiment analysis and question answering.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned; code/models available at GitHub link provided in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Designing a unified pretraining framework capable of excelling across natural language understanding (NLU), conditional, and unconditional text generation tasks without task-specific architectures.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task pretraining (document-level and sentence-level blank infilling for NLU, conditional/unconditional generation)
raw_extraction.extension: 2D positional encoding enables capturing both intra-span and inter-span dependencies during autoregressive blank infilling.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: null (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, Tsinghua University)
raw_extraction.innovation: Unified pretraining framework using autoregressive blank infilling with shuffled spans and a single [MASK] token, enabling shared parameters for natural language understanding and generation tasks
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU), text generation, sequence-to-sequence tasks, abstractive summarization, question generation, text infilling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unifying natural language understanding and generation tasks into a single pretraining paradigm
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task supervised fine-tuning (NLU and generation tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses 2D positional encoding for improved long-range dependency modeling
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: null (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, Tsinghua University)
raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of GLM Base with improved performance on NLU tasks through unified pretraining with autoregressive blank infilling
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding (NLU), text generation, sequence-to-sequence tasks, abstractive summarization, question generation, text infilling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unifying natural language understanding and generation tasks into a single pretraining paradigm
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task supervised fine-tuning (NLU and generation tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses 2D positional encoding for improved long-range dependency modeling
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: null (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, Tsinghua University)
raw_extraction.innovation: Extension of GLM Large with document-level blank infilling objective, enabling better handling of long-form documents
raw_extraction.application: Long-document natural language understanding, abstractive summarization, question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling effective long-document processing within the GLM framework
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task supervised fine-tuning (NLU and generation tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses document-level blank infilling objective alongside 2D positional encoding
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: null (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, Tsinghua University)
raw_extraction.innovation: Extension of GLM Large with sentence-level blank infilling objective, focusing on shorter context windows
raw_extraction.application: Short-document natural language understanding, text infilling, question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing computational efficiency with performance on sentence-level tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task supervised fine-tuning (NLU and generation tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses sentence-level blank infilling objective alongside 2D positional encoding
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.organization: null (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, Tsinghua University)
raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up model with 410 million parameters, combining document-level and sentence-level objectives for improved performance
raw_extraction.application: Advanced natural language understanding, abstractive summarization, question generation, text infilling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling up GLM for better performance on complex tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Autoregressive blank infilling with document-level and sentence-level objectives
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Multi-task supervised fine-tuning (NLU and generation tasks)
raw_extraction.extension: Combines document-level and sentence-level objectives with 2D positional encoding
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.innovation: **Autoregressive blank infilling** enables efficient pretraining by masking arbitrary sequences of tokens and predicting their trajectories, unlike traditional masked language modeling. The model leverages a Transformer decoder architecture with dynamic masking during training.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BookCorpus, Wikipedia (16GB), CC-News (English portion of Common Crawl News dataset, 376GB), OpenWebText (web content extracted from URLs shared on Reddit with at least three upvotes, 38GB), Stories subset of Common Crawl filtered to match story-like style (31GB, no longer publicly available)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, sequence-to-sequence tasks (e.g., text infilling, summarization, question answering), downstream NLU benchmarks (SuperGLUE, SQuAD)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code partially open-source with pretrained models made public later)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable pretraining of large language models with improved generalization via autoregressive blank infilling
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Blank infilling objectives for downstream tasks (e.g., cloze-style fine-tuning for SuperGLUE)
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.innovation: **Autoregressive blank infilling** enables efficient pretraining by masking arbitrary sequences of tokens and predicting their trajectories, unlike traditional masked language modeling. The model leverages a Transformer decoder architecture with dynamic masking during training and larger capacity than GLM-Base.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BookCorpus, Wikipedia (16GB), CC-News (English portion of Common Crawl News dataset, 376GB), OpenWebText (web content extracted from URLs shared on Reddit with at least three upvotes, 38GB), OpenWebText2 (66GB)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, sequence-to-sequence tasks (e.g., text infilling, summarization, question answering), downstream NLU benchmarks (SuperGLUE, SQuAD)
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code partially open-source with pretrained models made public later)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable pretraining of large language models with improved generalization via autoregressive blank infilling
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Blank infilling objectives for downstream tasks (e.g., cloze-style fine-tuning for SuperGLUE)
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces autoregressive blank infilling, where random spans of tokens are masked and the model predicts missing spans in an autoregressive manner, improving generalization over traditional masked language modeling.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Chinese corpora including Baidu Encyclopedia, Chinese Wikipedia, and Baike (Baidu’s encyclopedia)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, text generation, dialogue systems, and downstream NLP tasks
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in abstract or content)
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose language model pretraining with improved span-level generalization
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Autoregressive blank infilling (next-token prediction with masked spans)
raw_extraction.paper_title: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling
